name: Chicken TESTROOMS
short_description: You are chicken again! and let's tests more!
detailed_description:
It's..... It's CHICKEN Again!

And Test more levels!


Since the last test in ~Boiled Egg~, the room has been updated to more test levels.
There are more gimmicks, the difficulty has increased, and you might even get roasted to juicy roasted chicken!
Now it's your turn to pass the tests in this laboratory!

The Game Features are

・You can be a chicken again! so cute and colorful
・Easy to Hard Action Top-Down Puzzle
・Completely original arts
・Beautiful 3D graphics
・Mysterious and fantastic chicken world
・Simple Control ( better than ~Boiled Egg~ :) )
